561 DRUG_NONE_TKNG_ADMSN_CD DRUG_NONE_TKNG_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): None of above (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of admission the patient was not taking any drugs in the high-risk drug classes. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
